inputs.label: Volume in Cubic Inches
inputs.businessContext: The volume measurement in cubic inches to be converted to cubic centimeters.

businessContext_i18n.en: The volume measurement in cubic inches to be converted to cubic centimeters.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Santimetreküpe dönüştürülecek inç küp cinsinden hacim ölçümü.
businessContext_i18n.de: Das Volumen in Kubikzoll, das in Kubikzentimeter umgerechnet werden soll.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La mesure de volume en pouces cubes à convertir en centimètres cubes.
businessContext_i18n.es: La medida de volumen en pulgadas cúbicas a convertir a centímetros cúbicos.
businessContext_i18n.ar: قياس الحجم بالبوصة المكعبة المراد تحويله إلى سنتيمتر مكعب.

inputs.label: Conversion Factor
inputs.businessContext: The standard conversion factor from cubic inches to cubic centimeters (1 in³ = 16.387064 cm³).

businessContext_i18n.en: The standard conversion factor from cubic inches to cubic centimeters (1 in³ = 16.387064 cm³).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İnç küpten santimetreküpe standart dönüşüm faktörü (1 in³ = 16.387064 cm³).
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor von Kubikzoll in Kubikzentimeter (1 in³ = 16,387064 cm³).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le facteur de conversion standard des pouces cubes en centimètres cubes (1 po³ = 16,387064 cm³).
businessContext_i18n.es: El factor de conversión estándar de pulgadas cúbicas a centímetros cúbicos (1 in³ = 16.387064 cm³).
businessContext_i18n.ar: عامل التحويل القياسي من البوصة المكعبة إلى السنتيمتر المكعب (1 بوصة³ = 16.387064 سم³).

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for the rounded output.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yuvarlanmış çıktı için ondalık basamak sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das gerundete Ergebnis.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour le résultat arrondi.
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para la salida redondeada.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
